config.chest_thief.title: Chest Thief + Syndicate
config.chest_thief.chest_interaction_int: Ticks between each steal action. 20 ticks = 1 second.
config.chest_thief.chest_detection_radiu: Max horizontal distance for chest searching.
config.chest_thief.chest_detection_max_v: Filters out chests too far above or below the mob.
config.chest_thief.max_carry_slots.toolt: Number of item stacks the thief carries. Stops stealing when full.
config.chest_thief.spawn_min_nearby_ches: Required nearby chests for natural spawn. 0 = no requirement.
config.chest_thief.panic_chance.tooltip: Probability of fleeing when attacked (1.0 − panic chance = berserk chance).
Ticks the thief sprints away. 200 = 10 seconds.
Ticks the thief wanders away from the chest when inventory is full.
Radius BerserkTargetGoal scans for targets in.
config.chest_thief.depart_delay_ticks.to: Ticks with full inventory before the thief starts departing.
config.chest_thief.depart_duration_ticks: Ticks the thief wanders before despawning. Loot is "sold" afterwards.
config.chest_thief.max_age_ticks.tooltip: Forced departure after this many ticks. 48000 = 2 Minecraft days.
config.chest_thief.leaving_sound_min_tic: Shortest pause between satisfaction sounds during departure.
